history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A smartphone screenshot shows a social media video frame featuring two men standing beside a striped hammock and a large on-screen caption in Indonesian.

Setting:
The background appears outdoors with greenery and foliage visible, under daylight. A large tarp or fabric covers part of the scene, and the ground area looks cluttered with people and objects partially visible behind the foreground.

Visual Details:
The camera view is slightly tilted and tightly framed, with a dark, semi-transparent overlay typical of a video interface. In the center-left foreground, a person in a patterned or striped lower area (with light and dark horizontal stripes) is partially visible, while another person in darker clothing stands behind and to the right, leaning forward. A person in the right half wears a dark head covering or hat and a dark top, with their face partially obscured. Green plants and broad leaves fill the upper left background, and a large greenish, net-like or fabric-covered area occupies the right side background. In the lower middle, a blanket or fabric with alternating light and dark stripes stretches horizontally. The composition places the main figures in the center while multiple user interface elements overlay the video.

Visible Text:
LIVE
Nusanatara tv
BOOMING
alpin Maling Celana Dalam Wanita, Wajah Terekam Jelas!
666 rb
Sumber: NTV/DHANNY EKA
official.ntv
NusaantaraTVOfficial
Warga Dusun Telogosari, Desa Jambewangi, Sempu, Banyuwa… banyak
Pencarian : maling canycut

Practical Summary:
The image is a paused or captured frame from a live-style video with Indonesian captions overlaid on top of an outdoor scene. It shows people near a striped hammock or blanket, surrounded by plants and fabric in the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
